digest.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
digest.tldr: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

digest.title: NVIDIA and Japan Bring Full-Stack AI and Robotics to Every Industry
digest.tldr: Home to leading manufacturers, robotics pioneers, infrastructure builders and iconic gaming companies, of course, Japan is one of the world’s centers of AI — building across the full stack with NVIDIA technologies.…

digest.title: OpenAI loses trademark dispute at EU court
OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
digest.tldr: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware.  No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit.
